name: Honeyed Fudge
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Evaporated milk or light cream
1 square Unsweetened chocolate, broken into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine white and brown sugars, evaporated milk (or light cream), salt, and chocolate in a 2-quart heavy saucepan.
2. Cook slowly for five minutes, stirring to dissolve sugars.
3. If lightly buttering the sides of the pan is desired, add a small amount of butter to prevent sugar crystals from forming.
4. Add baking soda and honey.
5. Continue cooking at a fairly low boil, stirring to prevent scorching, until the mixture reaches the soft-ball stage (238°F).
6. Remove from heat and add butter without stirring.
7. Cool to lukewarm (110°F) and then add nuts and coconut.
8. Beat vigorously until the mixture starts to set (the color will change and lose its gloss).
9. Pour into a lightly buttered 8-inch square pan.
10. Allow to cool until firm, then cut into about 36 pieces.
Makes about 1 1/2 pounds.
